name: Untold Mystery: Angel’s Cry
short_description: Investigate a mysterious, medieval monastery and reveal the terrifying truth! Enter a remote Alpine monastery and uncover the truth in a story-rich hidden object adventure. You are about to investigate the disappearance of a monk as well as the curious case of a weeping statue.
detailed_description:
Something strange lurks within the monastery walls—voices in empty corridors, tears from stone eyes. As the only one who can decode this mystery, you'll use your secret identity and keen perception to reveal a story of loss, betrayal, and dark devotion in this mysterious hidden object adventure game!

🔎 Hidden Object & Puzzle Adventure – investigate  scenes and solve mini-games.

🧩 Dozens of locations & mini-games – mystery lurks from every dark corner.

🗺️ Map & Journal – always know where to go next.

🎧 Full voiceovers & HD visuals – immerse yourself in the story.

🛠️ 3 difficulty levels – from relaxed exploration to true challenge.

📴 Play completely offline — anytime, anywhere

🔒 No data collection — your privacy is safe

🕹 Gameplay

Click to search scenes, collect clues, combine items from your inventory, and complete mini-games to progress the story. Use hints if you get stuck — but the reward is uncovering more of the mystery.

🎮 Play your way

Explore, investigate and solve the mystery in your own way: adjustable challenge: Casual, Adventure, and Challenging difficulty modes. Win Achievements & Collectibles.

🌌 Atmospheric adventure

A gripping mystery: narrative-driven gameplay with a strong detective lead.

Immersive locations: explore, seeks, search and solve puzzles.

  • USE your skills and your secret identity to reveal the terrifying truth

  • INVESTIGATE and EXPLORE the monastery and its surroundings

  • INTERROGATE the inhabitants

  • FIND items and use them to progress

  • SOLVE perplexing puzzles and dozens of mini-games

  • EARN many different achievements

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Portuguese - Brazil, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
